candidates.why: Personnel-related overhead and a strong SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Selling/distribution expense is SG&A-like, but likely a subcomponent of broader other operating expenses in years where detailed disclosure is shown.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead buckets and avoided likely subcomponents such as 'Marketing and distribution' to reduce double counting with 'Other operating expenses'.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is amortization of capitalized R&D and appears as supplemental/below operating lines rather than a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.
Capitalized asset on the balance sheet, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense row is reported on the income statement. The only R&D-related row is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which is not a current-period R&D expense line for PROF mapping.

candidates.why: Broad total finance cost, but less preferred because granular recurring components are available.
Core recurring interest expense; best component for XINT.

Recurring finance-cost component; acceptable to include when using granular components.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components and excluded 'Finance expense' total to avoid double counting. Also excluded FX-related rows and the supplemental duplicate lease-interest row.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement line, not balance sheet equity.
Only a component of equity, not total book equity.
Best available owner/shareholder equity line; preferable to Total Equity when avoiding possible NCI double count.
Usable if no better owner equity line exists, but less preferred than shareholders' equity.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' as the owner equity line. Included 'Total Equity' as a lower-priority fallback if labels change across years. No non-controlling interest line is visible.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet preview.
